rationale: This archetype is an anime IP-bait hook (Goku/DBZ collectible card framing) targeting young male shounen/RPG/gacha fans — a near-total mismatch for a calm, abstract physics puzzle aimed at 25-55 casual relaxers. Visual palette (saturated cyan/yellow/red energy beams) clashes with the game's moody dark-purple + amber aesthetic, and the game has no character, no IP, and no combat to credibly support the hook. Do not adapt; the only salvageable idea is the "charge-up + explosive chain-reaction release" beat, which could inspire a non-IP creative showcasing ball chain reactions, but rebuild from scratch rather than borrow from this cluster.
